about.label: Who we are
about.headingMid: with a careful eye for proportion, light and
about.body1: Alrih is an independent architecture practice based in Bratislava, working across residential, cultural and small commercial projects. Each commission begins with a long conversation about how a place is used, where the light falls, and what stays once the noise has settled.
about.body2: We build slowly, with a small team and a short list of trusted craftspeople. The result is quiet, durable architecture made to be lived in for decades, not photographed once.

services.label: What we do
services.heading: Services
services.sub: Three areas of practice, each handled in-house from first sketch to final detail. We take on a small number of projects each year so attention does not get diluted.

arch.title: Architecture
arch.desc: New-build houses, additions and renovations. Concept through construction administration, with measured drawings and a clear, buildable detail set.

interior.title: Interior Design
interior.desc: Spatial planning, joinery, fixtures and material palettes coordinated with the architecture so the inside and outside agree on the same project.

viz.title: 3D Visualizations
viz.desc: Photoreal renders and walkthroughs produced from our working models useful for early client decisions and planning submissions alike.

steps.title: Brief
steps.body: A long first meeting on site or over coffee. Programme, budget, constraints.

steps.title: Concept
steps.body: Two or three directions, in plan and section, presented for honest feedback.

steps.title: Design
steps.body: Chosen direction is developed in detail, materials and light are committed.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: Permit drawings, tendering, and on-site supervision with our trusted trades.

steps.title: Handover
steps.body: Snagging, final photography and a short manual for the building's life.
